ai_product_opportunities.expected_user_value: Increased discovery of new music and improved overall user experience
ai_product_opportunities.opportunity: Personalized music recommendations based on user listening habits
ai_product_opportunities.why_ai_is_needed: To analyze large amounts of user data and provide accurate recommendations

ai_product_opportunities.expected_user_value: Increased user engagement and discovery of new music
ai_product_opportunities.opportunity: Automated playlist generation based on user preferences
ai_product_opportunities.why_ai_is_needed: To analyze user listening habits and generate playlists that fit their tastes

high_confidence_findings: Technical issues with the Windows desktop app

desired_listening_behaviors.behavior: Easy discovery and sharing of personalized stats
desired_listening_behaviors.user_goal: To share fun and interesting music-related content on social media

executive_summary.biggest_opportunity: Improving the performance and usability of the Windows desktop app
executive_summary.overall_problem: Technical issues with the Windows desktop app and confusing feature changes
executive_summary.primary_user_need: A seamless and intuitive music streaming experience

feature_requests.reason: To provide a clear and intuitive way to save songs
To reduce lag and improve overall user experience

example_reviews: I have to keep restarting it
confusing to know if a song is saved or added to a playlist

recommendation_frustrations.issue: Lack of clear indicators for saved songs
recommendation_frustrations.why_it_happens: The removal of the heart button and its replacement with a generic plus sign

repeat_listening_causes.cause: High-quality audio and large music library
repeat_listening_causes.evidence: I love the audio quality and the massive library of songs on Spotify

root_causes.reasoning: The Windows desktop app consumes too much RAM, leading to lag and performance issues
The replacement of the heart button with a generic plus sign causes confusion
supporting_evidence: confusing to know if a song is saved or added to a playlist

strategic_product_insights.business_impact: Increased revenue through subscription renewals and reduced customer support costs
strategic_product_insights.insight: Improving the Windows desktop app performance can increase user satisfaction and retention
strategic_product_insights.user_impact: A more seamless and enjoyable music streaming experience

strategic_product_insights.business_impact: Increased user interaction with the platform and potential revenue growth through targeted advertising
strategic_product_insights.insight: Reintroducing the heart button can improve user engagement and discovery
strategic_product_insights.user_impact: Easier discovery and saving of new music

confusing to know if a song is saved or added to a playlist
